title: .ontos Protocol 1.0 Launch
description: Launch board for .ontos Protocol 1.0.0 release, docs, packages, and launch response.

draftItems.title: Complete final release gate
draftItems.body: Track owner approvals, freeze dates, release notes approval, launch content approval, and final npm run release:check evidence.

draftItems.title: Publish packages and post-publish smoke
draftItems.body: Publish @ontos-protocol packages in dependency order and record npm run postpublish:smoke output.

draftItems.title: Deploy docs and hosted viewer demo
draftItems.body: Deploy the documentation site and verify the hosted viewer opens examples/project-state.ontos.

draftItems.title: Create GitHub release and upload artifacts
draftItems.body: Create v1.0.0, publish release notes, and upload archives, demo video, command packs, and SHA256SUMS.

draftItems.title: Open community starter issues
draftItems.body: Run the community starter issue command pack after labels and repository visibility are ready.

draftItems.title: Monitor launch feedback
draftItems.body: Monitor issues, discussions, npm install reports, docs errors, and compatibility feedback during launch week.
